{{Quote|Are you normally this resourceful, Tal Burren, or did you ''know'' I had an opening for a grade-ten tech on my personal staff?|[[Ysanne Isard]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand">''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]''</ref>}}
'''Tal Burren''' was a grade-four tech of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. His superior was [[Ivak]].

==Biography==
A dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], he made the jump from grade-four all the way to the hitherto nonexistent grade-thirteen by helping [[Ysanne Isard]] override [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade's]] tampering with the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace's]] computer system.

{{Char-stub}}
